site.title: Rahul Dodke · Data Science & Engineering
site.description: Rahul Dodke — Data Science Analyst & Software Engineer. Python, SQL, Machine Learning, and data-driven decision-making.

paragraphs: I'm a results-oriented Data Science Analyst with hands-on experience across Python, SQL, and Machine Learning — turning raw, messy datasets into pipelines and insights that teams actually rely on for decisions.
My work has improved data-driven decision-making by 15% and helped achieve 99.9% accuracy in production data-preprocessing pipelines, processing over 100,000 records every week.
I enjoy the full lifecycle — from writing the SQL that pulls clean data, to building the ML model, to shipping the dashboard that a non-technical stakeholder can actually use.

pillars.title: Clean Data, Clean Decisions
pillars.text: Rigorous preprocessing and validation pipelines so models and dashboards are built on data people can trust.

pillars.title: Insight Into Action
pillars.text: Analysis isn't the finish line — I focus on translating findings into decisions stakeholders can act on immediately.

pillars.title: Engineering Mindset
pillars.text: I bring software engineering discipline — version control, testing, automation — into every data science workflow.

experience.description: A timeline of impactful contributions in Data Science and Engineering.

items.company: Samatrix Consulting Pvt. Ltd. · Indore, M.P
bullets: Interpreted datasets to extract insights that led to a 15% improvement in data-driven decision-making across key business areas.
Standardized data cleaning procedures using Python and Pandas, leading to 99.9% accuracy in data preprocessing outputs.
Queried and examined over 100K records weekly using SQL and Python, cutting retrieval time by 20%.
Audited data quality on data sources, identifying and resolving 95% of data discrepancies to maintain high data integrity.
Directed a team of three in developing responsive websites, increasing user engagement by 20%.
Instituted automated code validation and CI pipelines, cutting bugs by 25% and reducing deployment times.
Boosted system efficiency by cutting load times by 25% using advanced programming techniques in C++ and Python.
Configured front-end and back-end systems with HTML, CSS, and Linux.
Engineered blockchain application solutions with Python and Solidity, improving code efficiency by 30%.
Orchestrated Docker deployments on AWS, improving transaction speed by 15%.
Configured Linux-based environments to support scalable, fault-tolerant applications, improving deployment efficiency by approximately 30%.

projects.description: Real-world applications of data science, ML, and engineering.

items.title: Sales Analysis Dashboard
items.description: Interactive Power BI dashboard analysing 12 months of sales data, with 5+ reports mapping regional profits across 50 zones and segmenting 15+ product subcategories.

items.title: Financial Market Trend Predictor
items.description: Python-based analytics engine evaluating stock and cryptocurrency trends with ML models, achieving a 15% increase in predictive accuracy. Refactored pipelines to cut processing latency by 30%.

items.title: Personal Portfolio (GitHub Pages)
items.description: This site — a GitHub API-driven portfolio with a custom admin back office for content publishing, fully responsive layouts, and mobile-first styling.

items.title: Competitive ML & DSA Practice
items.description: Ongoing problem-solving across LeetCode and HackerRank — algorithms, data structures, and applied ML challenges on Kaggle to sharpen core engineering fundamentals.

skills.description: From raw SQL queries to ML models deployed on cloud infrastructure.

resume.description: Get a complete overview of my experience, projects, and skills.

contact.note: Interested in collaborating or have an opportunity? I'm always open to new ideas and conversations — let's talk.

footer.tagline: Built with Python intuition and CSS stubbornness.
